properties.title: Donovan Head Start
properties.discovery: Radiological material was identified in construction waste and soil debris generated during playground improvements in September 2021.
properties.affected_area: Approximately 10,000 square feet beneath portions of the playground and parking lot
properties.building_results: EPA did not identify radiological abnormalities inside the building. Indoor radon results were below New York State standards.
properties.action: Contaminated material was excavated and disposed of in 2023 under EPA oversight. Clean fill was placed and the playground, walkway, and parking lot were restored.
properties.source_title: EPA Donovan Head Start Removal Site
properties.map_note: This marker represents a documented modern discovery and completed cleanup. It does not indicate that the entire property remains contaminated.
